turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, mujhe jaanna tha ki aap Star Health ka insurance accept karte ho?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, bilkul. Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic Star Health Insurance ke saath empanelled hai. Aap cashless facility ka bhi use kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh achha. Toh main kal admit hone wala hoon, umm, knee replacement ke liye. Kya documents laane padenge?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapko original insurance card, photo ID, aur doctor ka referral letter laana hoga. Admission ke waqt humara TPA desk pre-authorization form fill karne mein help karega.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Pre-authorization kitne time mein hoti hai usually?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Zyaadatar cases mein 2 se 4 ghante lagte hain. Agar aap subah 8 baje tak aa jaate hain toh din mein hi approve ho jaata hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai, mera naam Suresh Nair hai by the way.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Mr. Nair. Koi aur sawaal ho toh zaroor poochiye. Kal aane par humara insurance desk ground floor par milega, right side mein.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapka swagat hai. Apna khayal rakhiye!
